name: New York & Company
message: New York & Company is a leading specialty manufacturer and retailer of women's fashion apparel and accessories providing women with modern, wear to work solutions that are multi-functional at affordable prices. The company's website has a list of its best deals, with more to be added soon. But I wouldn't say it will be one of the best deals for them. They have broken off the dialog, and at this point we have no choice but to post their corporate fileshere for everyone to see. Stand by for the release.
